name: cicd-phase6-optimization
description: CI/CD optimization: pin runners to ubuntu-24.04, run pre-commit on changed files only for PRs, copy .pixi from builder stage instead of reinstalling in Dockerfile multi-stage builds, and generate before/after speedup reports via gh CLI. Use when: (1) migrating workflows off ubuntu-latest to prevent cache invalidation, (2) speeding up pre-commit CI by scoping to changed files, (3) fixing redundant pixi install in Dockerfile runtime stages, (4) measuring CI speedup with workflow duration metrics.
